name: EV Booking Platform
description: Cloud-ready EV charging station booking system (Spring Boot monolith).

APP_ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_EMAIL.description: Email of the initial administrator account, created on first start if no admin exists.

APP_ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_PASSWORD.description: Initial password for the bootstrap admin. Change it immediately after first login.

APP_ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_NAME.description: Display name for the bootstrap admin.
